description: A contest-based promotional format offering multiple prizes to encourage product purchases, combining urgency with reward incentives to drive customer participation and sales.
structural_recipe: Lead with contest announcement using celebratory emojis (❄🤩🎁✨). Clearly state prize pool size (e.g., 'مليون جائزة'). Highlight grand prize separately. Specify purchase requirement (product type, quantity). Use Arabic copy with emoji emphasis. Include call-to-action for purchase. Add participation terms/notes at bottom. Structure: Headline → Prize details → Purchase requirement → CTA → Terms.
why_it_works: Saudis respond to gamification and reward-based mechanics, especially when tied to luxury consumption. Contest formats create social sharing potential and FOMO. Direct purchase linkage converts engagement to immediate sales. Large prize pools signal brand generosity and trustworthiness.
transplantation_caveats: Verify contest legality under Saudi consumer protection and gaming regulations
Ensure prize claims are genuinely fulfillable and transparent
Data privacy statements required for participant information collection
Avoid unclear terms that could trigger negative sentiment or distrust
cultural_constraints: Frame contests around halal products only
Ensure prize fulfillment aligns with Islamic principles
